speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Before we go, let's talk about today's story that really captures what we're all about here in Queensland. The environment, innovation, and that never-give-up spirit.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] <cite index="2-2,11-3,11-4">Giant pandas moving from endangered to vulnerable status demonstrates how an integrated conservation approach can help save our planet's vanishing biodiversity, with the population rising 17 percent in a decade to 1,864 pandas in the wild</cite>. Sometimes persistence and smart planning really do pay off.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] From the smallest household solar panel to the biggest mining operation going renewable, from protecting pandas in China to protecting our Lions here at home - it all connects. Puts it all in perspective, doesn't it?

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] That's The Bright Side for today. I'm Jamie Chen.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And I'm Alex Mercer. Keep looking up, Queensland. ParkSyde rolls on.
